top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(p.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(v.Id) AS post_to_vote_ratio
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
LEFT JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
WHERE u.Id = 24;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(posts.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(votes.Id) AS post_to_vote_ratio
FROM users
LEFT JOIN posts ON users.Id = posts.OwnerUserId
LEFT JOIN votes ON users.Id = votes.UserId
WHERE users.Id = 24;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(p.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(v.Id) AS post_to_vote_ratio
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
LEFT JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
WHERE u.Id = 24;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = 24) * 1.0 / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM votes WHERE UserId = 24) AS post_to_vote_ratio

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(posts.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(votes.Id) AS post_to_vote_ratio
FROM users
LEFT JOIN posts ON users.Id = posts.OwnerUserId
LEFT JOIN votes ON users.Id = votes.UserId
WHERE users.Id = 24;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(p.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(v.Id) AS post_to_vote_ratio
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
LEFT JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
WHERE u.Id = 24;
